name: Crab Vegetable Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the chili sauce and mayonnaise.
2. Add the minced garlic, dry mustard, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, and salt to the bowl.
3. Stir until well mixed.
4. Gently fold in the chopped hard-boiled egg and crab meat, ensuring they are evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
5. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight to allow flavors to meld together.
